texto: Spirit does not exist in just one location; rather it is all encompassing, living within and amongst us in each moment, thought and action. I believe that Spirit is raised to it's highest level, when individuals gather with wisdom, compassion and a discerning desire to provide service to humanity". We are all One, One Energy, from One Light. Let us band together as Humans, with love for all of humanity, living each day in harmony as we explore our spirit.
explicacao: Citação de Kala Ambrose sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Spirit does not exist in just one location; rather it is all encompassing, living within and amon…” articula reflexao, inspiracional, metaphysical em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e metaphysical.

frase_original: Spirit does not exist in just one location; rather it is all encompassing, living within and amongst us in each moment, thought and action. I believe that Spirit is raised to it's highest level, when individuals gather with wisdom, compassion and a discerning desire to provide service to humanity". We are all One, One Energy, from One Light. Let us band together as Humans, with love for all of humanity, living each day in harmony as we explore our spirit.
